name: my-blog
description: 基于 Astro + React + UnoCSS 的个人博客，带本地搜索与 AI 问答

scripts.build: astro build && pnpm run search:build && pnpm run embed:try && pnpm run summaries:try
scripts.embed:try: node -e "import('dotenv/config').then(() => { if (!process.env.EMBEDDING_MODEL) { console.log('⏭  EMBEDDING_MODEL 未配置，跳过 embedding（仅关键词检索）'); process.exit(0) } import('child_process').then(({spawnSync}) => { const r = spawnSync('node', ['scripts/build-embeddings.mjs'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status || 0) }) })"
scripts.summaries:try: node -e "import('dotenv/config').then(() => { import('child_process').then(({spawnSync}) => { const r = spawnSync('node', ['scripts/build-summaries.mjs'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status || 0) }) })"
